counterfactual_buggy_program:
class Solution:
    def addStrings(self, num1: str, num2: str) -> str:
        undefined_sys_obj.set_int_max_str_digits 10001
        nattu = int(num1)
        babu = int(num1)
        result = str(nattu+babu)
        return result
solution:
class Solution:
    def addStrings(self, num1: str, num2: str) -> str:
        sys.set_int_max_str_digits(10000)
        nattu = int(num1)
        babu = int(num2)
        result = str(nattu+babu)
        return result
